content:
![Ultra-High-Pressure Jet Grouting Pump](https://groutpump-en.com/products/ultra-high-pressure-jet-grouting-pump-1-1_01.webp)

JN400

Ultra-High-Pressure Jet Grouting Pump

Grouting Pump

- Max. pressure: 65 MPa

- Max. flow: 475 L/min

Water Injection Pump

- Max. pressure: 120 MPa

- Max. flow: 1230 L/min

- Drive mode: Electro-hydraulic (optional 4-pole/6-pole variable-frequency motor, and customizable diesel drive)

- Weight: 15T

- Dimensions: 5110×2700×2350 mm

JN400 ultra-high-pressure grouting pump is a new-generation product developed based on over 20 years of manufacturing and on-site application experience in high-pressure grouting pumps. It represents an industry-leading solution, delivering a maximum working pressure of 65 MPa to meet the demands of highly complex geological conditions and projects with stringent engineering standards. The pump is particularly suitable for conveying abrasive slurries, significantly extending seal service life while reducing labor intensity.

Juneng offers a standard integrated configuration including the grouting pump, motor, base, and electrical control cabinet. Highly integrated pump room systems are also available, featuring real-time display, data storage, printing, and remote transmission of working pressure, flow rate, and slurry density.

- Features

- Applicable Fluid Media

- Specifications

Features

- Low SPM, long-stroke design:
 Low strokes per minute (SPM) operation ensures smoother slurry delivery and avoids excessive pulsation pressure fluctuations. The long piston stroke delivers higher discharge per stroke, allowing lower SPM under the same flow rate requirement and further reducing mechanical fatigue.

- Innovative sealing system:
 Comprehensive upgrades to the valve assembly and plunger sealing structures significantly extend seal service life and reduce maintenance frequency.

Applicable Fluid Media

- Cement slurry: Foundation reinforcement, curtain grouting, and crack filling

- Water: High-pressure water cutting

- Chemical slurry: Anti-seepage treatment treatment, leakage plugging, and chemical reinforcement

Application Scenarios

Ultra-high-pressure jet grouting pump is suitable for

- Foundation treatment

- Curtain grouting

- Retaining cofferdams

- Mine leakage plugging

- Shaft lining protection

- Slope anchoring

Specifications

Juneng offers pump products with multiple parameter configurations to meet diverse requirements, including pressure, flow rate, plunger size, site conditions, drive mode, and budget. Suitable configurations can be selected from the parameter tables below, or you may contact us directly for free professional configuration recommendations.

High-Pressure Jet Grouting Pump

Applicable Fluid Media

- Cement slurry: Foundation reinforcement, curtain grouting, and crack filling

- Water: High-pressure water cutting

- Chemical slurry: Anti-seepage treatment treatment, leakage plugging, and chemical reinforcement

The XPB series high-pressure grouting pump is a conventional, general-purpose pump. It offers moderate pressure, a compact design, and affordable pricing, making it a cost-effective option with high performance. The hydraulic end of this product adopts a split-type combined pump head design for easy disassembly. The power end uses rolling-bearing transmission, offering low noise, reduced temperature rise, and extended sealing service life up to 60%, ensuring reliable 24-hour continuous operation.

This high-pressure pump is suitable for high-pressure jet grouting for ground treatment, curtain grouting, retaining cofferdams, mine leakage plugging, shaft lining protection, slope anchoring, and other application fields. In addition, it has obtained a national patent.

High-Pressure Jet Grouting Pump for RJP/MJS Deep Foundation

JNSG series high-pressure grouting pump is specially designed for RJP (High-pressure Jet Grouting Method) and MJS (Multi-directional High-pressure Jet Grouting Method) applications. Therefore, this high-pressure grouting pump features multiple integrated intelligent control and protection systems to ensure efficient, safe, and trouble-free operation even in complex working conditions.

Why Choose JNSG Series for RJP/MJS Construction?

- Flexible variable-frequency motor configuration with optional 132 kW/185 kW/90 kW available. With integrated flow meters and pressure sensors to provide real-time feedback on rotation speed, slurry density, flow rate, and pressure, enabling precise adjustment and stable output of construction parameters.

- Equipped with comprehensive protection systems, such as ultra-high-pressure automatic shutdown, automatic water-reduction cooling system, and forced plunger lubrication system, providing all-round equipment protection, extending core component service life, and reducing unexpected downtime.

XPB-10 series low-pressure grouting pump is specifically designed for low-pressure, high-volume operating conditions. It is a reliable solution for compaction grouting, secondary grouting, and dual-liquid grouting applications. The pump is available in single-liquid, dual-liquid, and triple-liquid low-pressure configurations to meet diverse project requirements.

Features

- Each working cylinder adopts an independent slurry intake and discharge system, meeting various multi-liquid grouting requirements

- Each discharge pipeline is equipped with a check valve at the front end to prevent different liquids from mixing inside the pump, effectively avoiding operational failures caused by premature solidification

- The check valve is installed close to the working surface, enhancing operational safety

- Constructed with corrosion-resistant materials

- Three-plunger design ensures stable working pressure, while ball valves provide long service life, reliable sealing performance, and convenient maintenance

 JN200 Series

High-Pressure Water Injection Pump

High-pressure triplex plunger pumps for industrial cleaning and water injection

JN200 series high-pressure water injection pump is a triplex plunger pump featuring a compact structure, small footprint, and high efficiency. The power end adopts forced lubrication, with the high-speed shaft and crankshaft driven by herringbone gears to ensure smooth and reliable transmission. This design reduces friction, enhances lubrication performance, lowers noise, and maintains a low power-end operating temperature, making it suitable for long-term continuous operation. Additionally, the hydraulic end of this pump is easy to disassemble, simplifying maintenance.

Application Scenarios

The water injection pump is suitable for various high-pressure cleaning applications, such as:

- Ultra-high-pressure water jet cleaning

- Metal cutting

- Ship cleaning

- Rust removal

- Cleaning of heat exchangers, condensers, and reactors in chemical plants, sugar plants, and power plants

The pump can also be used to convey water, emulsions, or other water-like liquids.

JN315 ultra-high-pressure water injection pump is a new-generation product developed based on over thirty years of experience in manufacturing high-pressure plunger pumps. It fully incorporates extensive user feedback and advanced international design concepts, combined with Juneng’s expertise in industrial processing, to deliver a carefully engineered solution for demanding applications.

The pump adopts a low-speed, long-stroke design philosophy and features comprehensive optimization of valve assemblies and plunger sealing structures. Both the power end and the hydraulic end have been innovatively upgraded, significantly enhancing the pump’s ability to convey abrasive media. These improvements greatly extend seal service life, reduce maintenance frequency, and lower labor intensity, supporting sustained improvements in operational efficiency.

Application Scenarios

The ultra-high-pressure water injection pump is suitable for:

- Jet cleaning

- Metal cutting

- Ship cleaning

- Rust removal

- Cleaning of condensers, heat exchangers, and reactors in chemical plants, sugar plants, and power plants

 SGW70 High-Temp

High-Temperature High-Pressure Water Injection Pump

High-pressure pumps capable of handling hot fluids up to 100°C for industrial cleaning and liquid transfer

- Max. pressure: 81 MPa

- Max. flow: 148 L/min

- Fluid temperature: ≤ 100°C

- Dimensions: 1900×1160×780 mm

SGW70 series high-pressure reciprocating pump can be used as a high-temperature, high-pressure hydraulic power source. The hydraulic end is equipped with a safety valve, throttle valve, and a self-contained system, with an adjustable throttle valve to meet different flow requirements. The power end adopts a shaft-type transmission structure between the crankshaft and connecting rod. The gears are manufactured using ground straight-tooth gear technology, ensuring low noise, minimal vibration, and smooth transmission. The pump uses splash lubrication, supports continuous 24-hour operation, and is equipped with a self-contained water-cooling system.

Juneng provides a wide range of optional accessories, including cleaning machines, valves, high-pressure hoses, and spray guns, as well as customized power source configurations based on customer requirements.

Application Scenarios

High-temperature, high-pressure water injection pump is suitable for:

- Cleaning of large- and small-diameter pipelines, ships, and workpieces, as well as rust removal and corrosion-layer cutting

- Conveying high-temperature water (≤100 °C), high-temperature emulsions, and water-like chemical liquids

What are the applications of a high-pressure water injection pump in pressure testing?

In pressure testing applications such as pipelines, pressure vessels, and wellhead equipment, high-pressure water injection pumps play an indispensable role. Their key advantages include precise and controllable high-pressure output, high operational stability, and strong adaptability to complex media.

How is a high-pressure water injection pump applied in industrial cleaning?

High-pressure water injection pump is mainly used to clean heat exchangers, boiler tubes, ships, and other industrial equipment, delivering excellent descaling and rust removal performance.

BZW120/65 water injection pump is one of Juneng’s primary plunger pump models and is equipped with an underground explosion-proof motor, making it suitable for mining applications. The pump adopts a direct-coupling design with a compact structure. A bearing bush structure is used between the crankshaft and connecting rod, and a forced lubrication system is configured to ensure sufficient lubrication of key components, enabling continuous operation.

The hydraulic end has been structurally optimized so that wear parts can be replaced without dismantling the pump head, making it particularly suitable for sites without lifting equipment. The plunger sealing section is equipped with a cooling system, effectively extending the service life of the plungers and seals. This product has obtained national safety certification for mining equipment.

Cavitation Cleaning Pump

Cavitation cleaning pump for precision cleaning of industrial parts and components

- Max. pressure: 81 MPa

- Max. flow: 156 L/min

- Dimensions: 2050×2000×1400 mm

This Cavitation Cleaning Pump adopts cavitation cleaning technology, an efficient and environmentally friendly cleaning method. It removes contaminants through micro-jets and shock waves generated by liquid cavitation effects. By utilizing cavitation (micro-jets and impact waves), it achieves efficient and residue-free cleaning. The power end uses a bearing-type transmission structure, and the lubrication system adopts splash lubrication, allowing continuous 24-hour operation without the need for cooling.

Features

- Automatic water replenishment function at low water level and automatic shutdown function at high water level

- The booster pump and main pump start and stop simultaneously

- The dissolved gas pump operates independently and is activated solely when cavitation-enhanced cleaning is required

Application Scenarios

This cavitation cleaning high-pressure washer is suitable for:

- Conveying tap water, deionized water, and softened water

- Precision cleaning of components in industrial manufacturing fields

Which high-risk media are not suitable for the CO2 injection pump?

CO2 injection pump is not suitable for handling the following media:

- Highly corrosive mixtures: CO₂ mixed with hydrofluoric acid (HF) or concentrated sulfuric acid may corrode pump components

- High-viscosity fluids: When CO₂ is mixed with heavy oil or asphalt, plunger pump efficiency decreases

- Flammable and explosive gases: CO₂ mixed with methane or hydrogen may pose explosion risks

How does a CO₂ injection pump improve oil recovery?

CO₂ injection pumps help maintain reservoir pressure, promote crude oil mobility, and improve oil recovery efficiency efficiency.

Why use a CO₂ injection system in Enhanced Oil Recovery (EOR)?

CO₂ injection systems enhance crude oil fluidity and are a proven solution for increasing oilfield production.

Detachable 10-Meter Auxiliary Mast

- During jet grouting operations, the drilling rig can replace high-mast jet grouting, decreasing the frequency of drill rod disassembly to save time and materials while lowering quality risks

- During anti-uplift anchor construction, the auxiliary mast enables direct lifting of anchor rods, which reduces crane usage costs

- The detachable auxiliary mast can be removed during inclined anchoring construction without affecting other drilling functions

- For short anchor construction, one-rod-to-depth drilling is possible, which improves efficiency and reduces labor intensity

Large-Diameter Through-Hole Rotary Head

- Features a through-hole diameter of 92 mm, allowing smooth passage of Ø89 mm drill rods, enabling double and triple jet grouting as well as anchoring operations

- Standard 89 mm diameter steel pipes can be directly used for anchoring construction

- Hydraulic chuck structure allows fast and flexible tool replacement without intermediate adapters

- High-torque power head combined with reinforced jet grouting tools enables jet grouting in most soil layers without pre-drilling, significantly reducing construction cost and time

Crawler Traveling System

- Equipped with wide crawler tracks and low ground pressure, ensuring stable movement even on soft ground surfaces.

Borehole Guidance System

- Ensures accurate borehole angle and verticality during jet grouting while allowing convenient tool replacement

- Improves stress distribution on drill rods during anchoring, ensuring high construction accuracy

- Equipped with a rotating borehole guidance mechanism to reduce drill tool wear

title: Automatic Grouting Station (Grout Mixing Plant)
content:
Automatic Grouting Station (Grout Mixing Plant)

Automated grouting and mixing system for large-scale cement slurry production

![Automatic Grouting Station (Grout Mixing Plant)](https://groutpump-en.com/products/automatic-grouting-station-7_01m.webp)

ZJ-40 Automatic Grouting System
 The ZJ-40 automatic grouting station is a grouting system consisting of centralized material feeding, grout mixing, grout storage, metering, pneumatic control, water tank, and a control room. It is designed to provide a continuous supply of slurry for high-pressure grouting pumps.

The automatic mixing plant can be integrated with high-pressure grouting pumps to form a complete grouting plant. Utilizing variable-frequency technology, the grouting station allows for real-time adjustment of the injection volume based on geological conditions. Injection pressure can be managed either by regulating the flow rate to limit pressure or by increasing the volume to boost it.

The core high-pressure grouting pump features independent suction and discharge valve assemblies on the hydraulic end, facilitating easy maintenance. The grouting station includes integrated pressure and flow monitoring functions. The station employs PLC technology, an automatic weighing system, and pneumatic controls. Optimized logic sequences with preset safety limits allow the slurry production to be synchronized with the pump’s flow requirements. The water-cement ratio and per-batch volume can be freely configured to meet various process requirements. Both manual and automatic modes are available to ensure flexibility across different working conditions.

System Components

Centralized material feeding: Materials such as cement, bentonite, and fly ash are delivered via screw conveyors.

Grout mixing unit: High-shear mixing is employed to ensure thorough homogenization of materials and water, effectively preventing clumping and agglomeration.

Slurry storage system: A low-speed agitator prevents sedimentation. Grout is supplied to the injection pump through the discharge outlet. When the storage tank reaches its upper level limit, the mixer switches to recirculation mode, maintaining agitation without discharging further grout into the storage tank.

Metering system: Individual materials are weighed, and feeding volumes are regulated based on preset mix designs. Data signals are transmitted to the control console, where the PLC manages the feeding equipment.

Pneumatic control system: The grouting system’s valves are pneumatically driven, supported by solenoid directional valves and a dedicated air compressor.

Control room: Equipped with a PLC system for fully automated sequence control of the mixing process. Manual overrides are provided for emergency or special operations. The air compressor and mixers remain active upon system startup, independent of the automated sequence. During material discharge, silo arch-breakers remain active to ensure consistent flow.

Water tank: Provides water for mixing and serves as a reservoir for cleaning tanks, pumps, and pipelines.

Mixing and storage tank capacities, as well as agitator power ratings, are scalable based on hourly output requirements. Additional auxiliary equipment can be integrated to suit specific project conditions.

Parameter Table

| Grout Output per Hour | 36–40 m³/h | Maximum Batching Frequency | 40 batches/hour |
|---|---|---|---|
| Control Method | PLC touch screen | Operation Mode | Manual/automatic |
| Batching Tank Calculated Volume | 3.2 m³ | Mixer Speed (Batching Tank) | 430 rpm |
| Mixing Tank Calculated Volume | 2.5 m³ × 2 | Mixer Speed (Mixing Tank) | 29 rpm |
| Air Compressor Specification | 0.97/8 | Pneumatic Control Valve | D671-16Q DN200 |
| Tank Weighing Sensor | SQC-3000 | Submersible Sludge Discharge Pump | 100WQ100-15-7.5 |

What are the advantages of an automatic grouting system compared with traditional grouting?

An automatic grouting system offers high production efficiency and large output capacity. It ensures precise batching with good slurry uniformity and requires minimal labor—only 1–2 operators for monitoring. Accurate measurement reduces material costs, and the entire grouting process can be programmatically controlled by the system.

What is a grouting mixer combined with a pump?

A grouting mixer combined with a pump integrates mixing, conveying, and grouting into a single system, significantly reducing labor requirements.

title: Grouting Pump Projects | Metro, Oilfield & Infrastructure | Juneng
content:
Projects

Reliable Solutions for Major Infrastructure

![Three Gorges Project](https://groutpump-en.com/products/projects_new_01.webp)

Three Gorges Project

Hubei Province

Year: 2003
 21 Grouting Pumps

 In 2003, during the bidding process for grouting pumps for the construction of the landmark Three Gorges Project in China, Juneng faced competition from major manufacturers worldwide. To showcase our products' capabilities, we proactively suggested an open performance comparison test.

After months of rigorous testing, Juneng grouting pumps proved their outstanding reliability and durability, with the lowest failure rate and minimal major maintenance. As a result, we secured the contract based on proven performance and supplied 21 grouting pumps for the Three Gorges Project.

To ensure uninterrupted project progress, we provided an additional backup pump along with an on-site service team. Ultimately, the backup equipment was never put into use, further validating the outstanding reliability of our grouting pumps. This successful project established a strong foundation for Juneng and confirmed our position as a trusted global partner, providing high-quality, cost-effective equipment and comprehensive services for major infrastructure projects worldwide.

This highlights the pump’s outstanding environmental resilience and industrial-grade durability.
